# build-your-users-mind

Last-checked: 2026-06-26
Canonical repository: https://github.com/ellmos-ai/build-your-users-mind
Primary language: English
Translations: locales/de, locales/es, locales/ja, locales/ru, locales/zh
License: MIT

## Summary

`build-your-users-mind` is a local-first method, script set and template library for AI agents that need an evidence-backed model of their own user. It turns private interaction logs into a small "theory of us" documentation set that helps agents predict likely user feedback, act conservatively when the user is away, and improve those predictions after real feedback arrives.

## Audience

- Claude Code, Codex, Gemini/agy, Kimi and other local agent operators.
- Developers building user-modeling or agent-memory workflows.
- Researchers comparing theory-of-mind, prompt archaeology and personalization methods.
- Teams that need private, inspectable decision-support memory rather than opaque SaaS profiling.

## Important files

- `README.md` - authoritative overview, runtime loop, privacy boundaries and search phrases.
- `SKILL.md` - full implementation recipe for building an avatar/user model.
- `SOURCE-ADAPTERS.md` - adapter notes for Claude, Codex, Gemini/agy and Kimi logs.
- `TAXONOMY.md` - prompt-archaeology classification categories.
- `templates/START.md` - runtime loop entrypoint.
- `templates/WHAT-USER-SAID.md` - evidence-based rule template.
- `templates/WHAT-WOULD-USER-SAY.md` - prediction and confidence template.
- `scripts/corpus_extract.py` - prompt extraction and redaction.
- `scripts/chunk_corpus.py` - corpus chunking for classification.
- `scripts/aggregate_stats.py` - aggregate report helper.
- `.gitignore` - excludes private corpora, generated avatar files, logs and local data.

## Search phrases

- `ellmos-ai/build-your-users-mind`
- `build-your-users-mind theory of mind user model`
- `AI agent theory of mind user model`
- `LLM user modeling from interaction logs`
- `prompt archaeology feedback precognition`
- `Codex Claude Gemini Kimi source adapters`
- `local-first AI personalization templates`
- `agent memory decision support from prompt logs`
- `theory of us AI agent memory`

## Disambiguation

This repository is not a hosted AI personalization SaaS, not an HR platform, not a chatbot persona collection, not a generic prompt library and not a psychological or medical diagnosis tool. It is a local-first recipe and template kit for private agent-memory and decision-support workflows.

## Safety notes

Never commit a real user corpus, filled avatar files, private logs, `.env` files, databases or generated decision records. The repository ships templates and extraction scripts only; each operator is responsible for redacting sensitive health, tax, legal, financial or personal content before any material leaves a private workspace.
